name: West Germany
summary: England's fiercest rival of the 20th century — the beaten finalist in 1966, and the side that ended the 1990 and 1996 tournament runs on penalties.

name: Germany
summary: Successor rivalry to West Germany. Beat England on penalties at Euro 1996.

name: Croatia
summary: Ended England's 2018 World Cup run in the semi-finals, going on to reach the final themselves.

name: Italy
summary: Beat England on penalties in the Euro 2020 final at Wembley, England's first major final since 1966.

name: France
summary: Eliminated England in the 2022 World Cup quarter-finals on their way to the final.

name: Spain
summary: Beat England in the Euro 2024 final in Berlin, the tournament's outstanding side.

name: DR Congo
summary: Gave England a scare in the round of 32 at the 2026 World Cup before going out 2-1.

name: Mexico
summary: Co-hosts of the 2026 World Cup, beaten 3-2 by England in an instant-classic round of 16 tie in Mexico City.

name: Norway
summary: Led by Erling Haaland, pushed England to extra time in the 2026 quarter-final before Jude Bellingham's brace won it.

name: Argentina
summary: Reigning world champions and England's 2026 semi-final opponents in Atlanta.
